title: DialsConfig
description: config/dials.json - build-only generator tunables (NOT baked into the bundle). Reseed budget, seed salt, per-tier grid shape, clue-type weights, and story weights. Human-edited (CLAUDE.md #6). Top-level additionalProperties is open because dials accumulates knobs as clue types are added.

evolution.change: Initial machine-checkable formalization of config/dials.json: max_reseeds, seed_salt, story{weights{<clueType>->int},share_cap}, template_rev, tier{<tier>->{nominal,shape,shared}}, weights{<slotRule>->int}.
evolution.why: The generator's build-only knobs must be schema-validated so a malformed weight or missing salt fails fast (CLAUDE.md #6); dials is not baked, so extra keys stay tolerant.
